title: Fight for the Matterhorn
director: Mario Bonnard, Nunzio Malasomma, Luis Trenker
writer: Arnold Fanck, Carl Haensel, Nunzio Malasomma
actors: Luis Trenker, Marcella Albani, Peter Voß
plot: This Alpine thriller is based on the story of English climber Edward Whymper who vies with Jean-Antoine Carrel, an Italian mountain guide, to conquer the Matterhorn.
